About GTS Enterprises

Trust Once,
Services Best

GTS Enterprises was founded in 2017 with a strong vision of providing reliable and efficient Corrosion Protection (CP) solutions across critical infrastructure sectors.

We are the official AMC contractor for GAIL (India) Limited, maintaining the Maharashtra Pipeline Network — 550+ km of underground gas pipeline from Aptibudruk to Borle.

Certified cathodic protection engineers and field technicians
NACE, OISD & PNGRB compliant operations
Full compliance with Indian Standards and safety codes
End-to-end project delivery — survey to maintenance
Tarapur Base
Belapur Base
Trombay Base
What We Do

Our Services

CP
Cathodic Protection
Design, installation and commissioning of impressed current and sacrificial anode CP systems for pipelines and structures.
PC & W
Pipeline Coating & Wrapping
Anti-corrosion coating application, holiday testing and wrapping for new and existing pipeline infrastructure.
SM
CP System Maintenance
Periodic monitoring, testing and maintenance ensuring continued effectiveness and full regulatory compliance.
MS & I
CP Material Supply & Installation
Procurement and installation of anodes, rectifiers, junction boxes and all CP system components.
CIPS / DCVG
Testing & Surveying
Close Interval Potential Survey (CIPS) and DCVG surveys for complete pipeline integrity assessment.
Need a Custom Solution?
Talk to our team — we deliver end-to-end corrosion protection.
